Algorithm Methodology

Powered by Weighted K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN). The engine takes 10 granular variables and standardizes them into positional Z-Scores to compute N-dimensional Euclidean distance.

Predictions are scaled to WAR/600 Snaps to remove volume bias and evaluate pure positional efficiency.

Engineered by @Shauncore

Head-to-Head Positional Z-Scores
